changelog: FIX: Tapping "Sports Guide" on the top nav no longer crashes the app. v1.44.79 promoted Sports Guide to its own top-nav tab but forgot to register the destination — IllegalArgumentException on every tap. Restored.

FIX: Pressing D-pad DOWN from the Discover row now lands on the Hush+ Coming Soon section as intended. Previously it pointed at a removed page and bounced focus into the left sidebar — looking like the side menu was "opening" by itself.
Both regressions affected Dev, Official and Canada builds.
